statement: A simply supported weightless beam AB (length 5 m) has a pin at A (x=0) and a roller at B (x=5 m). A point load of 800 N acts at 60° above the negative x-axis (i.e., 120° from positive x) at point C (x=3 m). Find the reactions at A and B.
common_student_errors: Using the full 800 N magnitude for moment calculation instead of only the vertical component
Misidentifying the angle: using 60° instead of the correct 120° from positive x-axis
Ignoring the horizontal component Ax that balances the horizontal component of the applied load
